patch.value:
Symptom: default `--group-by milestone` lumps every item under "(no milestone)".
Repro: seed items with `--sprint M1/M2`, run `pm gantt`.
Observed: one group "(no milestone)".
Expected: items grouped by their sprint/release.
Root cause: pm has no `milestone` field; code read item.milestone -> always undefined.
Fix: itemMilestone() maps milestone grouping onto item.milestone ?? sprint ?? release. Verified: groups M1/M2/(no milestone), groupCount 3.
gantt: milestone grouping empty (pm has no milestone field; use sprint/release)
